normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem bst_insert_precondition {t : Tree} {key : Int} (h : BST t) : BST t := by
  simpa using h
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Benchmark-facing: the input tree must be a valid strict BST (in-order strictly ascending).

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem bst_insert_preserves_BST (t : Tree) (key : Int) (hBST : BST t) : BST (bst_insert t key)
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Benchmark-facing: insertion preserves the BST property for all cases (including duplicates as no-op).
Benchmark-facing: key multiset changes by adding {key} exactly when key is absent; otherwise it stays the same.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem bst_insert_duplicate_noop (t : Tree) (key : Int) (hBST : BST t) (hmem : key ∈ keys t) :
  keys (bst_insert t key) = keys t
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Benchmark-facing: inserting an existing key is a no-op on the key multiset.
